CONTENT.Club career: He made his debut for FC Lokomotiv Moscow on 31 August 2022 in a Russian Cup game against FC Pari Nizhny Novgorod. That remained his only game for Lokomotiv's senior squad.On 7 July 2023, Savin moved to FC Tyumen.

SUMMARY: Andrey Sergeyevich Savin (Russian: Андрей Сергеевич Савин; born 30 August 1999) is a Russian football player who plays for FC Sibir Novosibirsk.
